capabilities_used.evidence: 明确直说：[2024-11-30] "$FET / $USD - Update   Cup and Handle breakout. LFG"；附图里也有典型杯柄突破后的水平位上破。

他大量强调回踩后继续上行，如 [2025-05-31] "$ETH / $USD - Update   $2750 reclaim and we are good to go"、[2025-06-30] "$FET / $USD - Update   0.80c is the level to reclaim for that next level up here"，本质是等回踩/收复后顺势做延续。
虽然他更多画的是水平价位而不是均线，但表达逻辑与‘关键收复确认’高度一致："0.34c to reclaim for a solid entry"、"$1.68 reclaim for an entry"、"$28.50 is the level to hold above"。
整体长期默认牛市/上升趋势框架，反复使用 "The best part of the bull cycle is yet to come"、"The final stage of the bull cycle is yet to come"、"UP ONLY"。
他经常把价格理解为区间等待突破或收复，例如 [2024-08-31] "$FET / $USD - Update  Range for a bit more then pump higher please"；图里多次出现水平箱体上沿/中位线作为决策点。
图 6 的 DOGE 周线是明显的长期下降趋势线压制后向上突破；[2024-11-30] "$CRV / $USD - Update   Break that trend line. I will enter" 也说明他常用下降趋势线突破做触发。
多张图都是水平阻力+抬高低点/逼近阻力的结构，尤其图 3、图 7、图 8 都是围绕固定横线等待上破；[2026-04-04] "$FET pump is coming. Grinding closer to resistance."
[2024-05-31] "$ETH / $BTC - Update   Still sign of an #Altseason yet, i will keep you posted on this as we get closer." 说明他会用 BTC/ETH 或市场结构判断山寨季切换。
他高频使用 bull cycle 阶段叙事，如 "The best part of the bull cycle is yet to come"、"The final stage of the bull cycle is yet to come"、"2025 will be bullish for #Crypto IMO .. At least the first half"。
[2024-01-31] "#FOMC stats before the release in a couple of hours"、"Are we thinking that the FED cut rates legends or keep them as they are"，说明他会关注宏观事件窗口，但不是核心框架。
他多次强调等待更安全位置，不盲目追或抄底，如 [2025-01-31] "$DOGE / $USD - Update   0.34c to reclaim for a solid entry for me to get back in safely."
风控口径反复出现："NEVER INVEST MORE THAN YOU CAN AFFORD TO LOSE"、"ALWAYS DCA  Never go all in"、"Do not be over exposed ever on any investment"。
[2024-08-31] "$INJ / $USD - Update   Looking vulnerable today i have to see. I cut my position and flip short if we lose that low we are on now"，是非常典型的失效即减仓/反手。
图 4 是他拿来类比的典型抛物线冲顶结构；并且他明确说过 [2024-04-30] "Going up in a straight line is not healthy and always ends up in a horrific correction"。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Horizontal Level Reclaim Entry
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use a previously lost or contested horizontal support/resistance as the main trigger. Enter only after price reclaims the level and preferably holds it on close.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把前期失守或反复争夺的水平位作为核心触发条件，只有在价格重新收复并最好收盘站稳后才入场。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: "$2750 reclaim and we are good to go"、"0.80c is the level to reclaim"、"0.34c to reclaim for a solid entry"、"$1.68 reclaim for an entry"。这是他最稳定、最重复的执行语法，但 seed 里没有专门的水平位收复规则。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Q4 Crypto Seasonality Bias
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Apply a bullish prior into late Q3/Q4 based on recurring seasonal narratives such as Uptober, Moonvember and year-end momentum.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 基于 Uptober、Moonvember、年末冲刺等季节性叙事，在每年 Q3 末到 Q4 给市场施加一个先验看多偏置。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2024-09-30] "#UPTOBER TOMORROW"、[2025-09-30] "Who's ready for Q4 tomorrow? -Uptober -Moonvember -Bullcember"、[2024-11-30] "BRING ON #PUMPTEMBER TOMORROW"。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Trendline Break Confirmation Entry
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Wait for a clean break of a major descending trendline before initiating a swing long, often combined with a horizontal hold above nearby support.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 等待主要下降趋势线被有效突破后再开多，通常还结合附近水平位站稳作为二次确认。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2024-11-30] "$CRV / $USD - Update   Break that trend line. I will enter"；图 6 的 DOGE 周线也是典型的长期下降趋势线突破后再看上方水平目标。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Sector Rotation Watchlist
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Track which narrative sector is currently leading and rotate focus into the next likely group rather than treating the whole alt market as one block.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 跟踪当前领涨叙事板块，并提前埋伏下一个可能接力的板块，而不是把整个山寨市场当成一个整体来交易。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2024-02-29] "Different sectors will pump one at a time. Right now we have #Memecoins pumping .. I am keeping an eye on #Gamefi for clues of an impending move"；[2024-05-31] 还专门发了 "$INJ Ecosystem" 图。

personal_quirks.quote: BUY ON DUMPS SELL ON PUMPS   #Crypto101
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 核心执行哲学是逢回撤买、逢情绪性拉升卖，不追高。

personal_quirks.quote: Going up in a straight line is not healthy and always ends up in a horrific correction   A Pump, Consolidation, Pump, Consolidation is the best and healthiest way to proceed up
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 他偏好健康趋势结构，认为上涨需要通过横盘/回踩消化，而不是无脑垂直拉升。

personal_quirks.quote: Sometimes the best position is no position at all. Weird how so many find that hard to understand
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 没有确认就空仓等待，避免强行交易。

personal_quirks.quote: NEVER INVEST MORE THAN YOU CAN AFFORD TO LOSE
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 仓位上限先于观点，先保证能活下来。

personal_quirks.quote: Put the greedy aside and take profit as you go
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 分批止盈，反贪婪，是他面向散户受众反复灌输的纪律。

unique_traits: 他不是复杂指标型交易员，而是把极简 TA 语言化、内容化：水平位、趋势线、区间、收复、牛市阶段，这几种元素反复组合。与很多高深派 TA 不同，他的优势在于把 swing 级别的方向判断包装成极强的社区动员和情绪叙事。执行上看似很亢奋，但真正的入场口径往往是“reclaim/hold above this level”这种保守确认式触发。

low_conviction_phrases: i would personally like to see
looking vulnerable today i have to see
